name: Waikiki Iced Tea
directions: In a large glass filled with ice, add the vodka, gin and rum and top off with the pineapple juice (make sure there’s at least 4 ounces in there or it will taste too strong).
Squeeze in the juice of a lime wedge and a lemon wedge, and drop them inches Garnish with a pineapple slice and umbrella, if desired. Makes 1 cocktail.

name: Kona Spiced Coffee
directions: Stir spices into hot brewed coffee.
Serve with cream and sugar if desired.

name: Piña Passion
directions: Pour the first seven ingredients into a blender along with 1/2 cup of crushed ice. Blend all items.
Pout mixture over ice cubes placed in a cored out pineapple or over ice in a glass.

name: Banilla Splash
directions: Add all ingredients to a hurricane glass filled with ice cubes.
Stir well, add a cherry and serve.

name: The Best Mai Tai
directions: mix it all together and shake over ice
strain into tall iced filled glass.
serve with citrus wedges.

name: Toopua Blue Lagoon Cocktail
directions: Pour all ingredients (except lime wedges) into a cocktail shaker, with ice, and shake.
Strain into two margarita glasses, garnish with lime wedges and serve.

name: Tahitian Treat Cocktail
directions: Fill 2 tall highball glasses with ice.
Add liquors, juice, and top off with soda.  Garnish with cherries.

name: Polynesian Cherry Cocktail
directions: Rim each cocktail glass with sugar by rubbing the rim of the glass with the lime wedge and dipping it in the sugar.
Combine the rest of the ingredients with cracked ice in a cocktail shaker and shake well.
Pour into chilled glass.

name: Coco Chaos
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender with a small handful of ice.
Blend, pour, drink.

name: Hawaiian Island Sunset Drink Recipe
directions: Build in highball glass filled with ice, stir and enjoy!

name: Guava Margarita from My Yard
directions: Combine all ingredients with the exception of lemon slices and salt in a shaker. Place plenty of ice into shaker and shake for 30 seconds or so.
Pour into martini or other glasses of your choice and place several ice cubes in the drinks.  Top with lemon slice on the rim.
You may also want to wet the glass rim with lemon juice and dip into coarse salt  for salt rimmed glass before pouring in the drink.

name: Mango Mai Tai
directions: Measure ingredients into a large glass (20 oz).
Add ice to fill glass.
Stir well.
Note: You can reserve the dark rum until after stirring with the ice and pour it on top to allow it to float.
